---
name: Bug 报告 / Bug Report
about: 提交一个问题以帮助我们改进 / Submit a problem to help us improve
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

<!-- 请尽可能完整填写以下信息，感谢你的贡献！ / Please fill out the following information as completely as possible. Thanks for your contribution! -->

## Describe the Bug / 问题描述
**English:** A clear and concise description of what the bug is.
**中文:** 清晰且简明地描述该错误是什么。

> [Insert description here / 在此插入描述]

## To Reproduce / 复现步骤
**English:** Steps to reproduce the behavior:
**中文:** 复现该行为的步骤：

1. Go to '...' / 前往 '...'
2. Click on '....' / 点击 '....'
3. Scroll down to '....' / 滚动到 '....'
4. See error / 看到错误

> **Note:** If possible, provide a minimal code snippet or link to a repository.
> **注意:** 如果可能，请提供最小的代码片段或仓库链接。

## Expected Behavior / 预期行为
**English:** A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.
**中文:** 清晰且简明地描述你期望发生的情况。

> [Insert expected behavior here / 在此插入预期行为]

## Actual Behavior / 实际行为
**English:** A clear and concise description of what actually happens.
**中文:** 清晰且简明地描述实际发生的情况。

> [Insert actual behavior here / 在此插入实际行为]

## Screenshots / Logs / 截图与日志
**English:** If applicable, add screenshots or error logs to help explain your problem.
**中文:** 如果适用，请添加截图或错误日志以帮助解释你的问题。

> [Drag and drop images or paste logs here / 拖拽图片或粘贴日志在此]

## Environment / 环境信息
**English:** Please complete the following information relevant to your platform.
**中文:** 请填写与你平台相关的以下信息。

- **OS:** [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14.0, Ubuntu 22.04] / [例如: Windows 11, macOS 14.0, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **Mod Version:** [e.g. v1.2.3] / [例如: v1.2.3]
- **SPT Version:** [e.g. v4.0.0] / [例如: v4.0.0]
- **Tarkov Version:** [e.g. v0.16.9.0.40087] / [例如: v0.16.9.0.40087]

## Additional Context / 其他背景
**English:** Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., related issues, potential causes).
**中文:** 在此添加关于该问题的任何其他背景信息（例如：相关问题、潜在原因）。

> [Insert additional context here / 在此插入其他背景信息]

## Checklist / 检查清单
- [ ] 我已搜索过现有 issues，确认没有重复 / I have searched existing issues and confirmed this is not a duplicate
- [ ] 我已填写以上所有必要信息 / I have filled out all necessary information above
